title: Black Cat Cabaret
company: the dark and daring heyday of Parisian cabaret culture, yet with a timeless sensibility all of its own, the show features some of the finest cabaret, circus and burlesque performers on the international circuit. Join us!
description: SEAYONCÉ award-winning, spirit-raising queer character comedy from "UK's premier witch"AMAZI jaw-dropping hula and dazzling circus spectacle performancesFELIPE REYES chair-stacking hand balance from Colombian circus legendPENNY VALENT neo-burlesque acts and smoking hot fire spectacleALVARO GRANDE maestro of club juggling and objects manipulation+ special guests to be announced!

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - East Anglia & South East May 17, 2025 Updated: August 9, 20
reviews.excerpt: A dizzying hour of cabaret entertainment. Electro-pop titan Laurie Black is a Brighton Fringe staple, her Bad Luck Cabaret an always-diverse mix of interesting art far from the complacency sometimes seen in this genre of tent-based vaudeville.
